content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Increasing by Modulo". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1169/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains an integer N, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains N space-separated integers, the array elements.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make the array increasing by modulo.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to track the minimum number of operations required to make the array increasing by modulo.
